function.name: _app_check_setting
function.description:
Perform integrity and validity verification on the overall configuration of the current application's [draft state]. Used for final check before publishing the application.

【Usage Scenarios】
- This verification must be executed before calling the publishing tool
- Only checks the draft version, does not affect the published version
- This operation does not modify any data or configuration

【Verification scope includes but is not limited to】
- Data table structure validity
- Field configuration integrity
- Workflow configuration validity
- Expression syntax correctness
- Script dependency check
- Dashboard reference integrity
- API / website module dependency relationships

【Return result explanation】
- If there are errors, an error list will be returned (including module, type, error reason)
- If verification passes, a verification success identifier is returned

⚠️ Mandatory rule: This tool must be called for verification before publishing the application.
